title: Build Systems, Not Code - Angie Jones, Agentic AI Foundation
summary: Angie Jones argues that AI coding agents shift engineering focus from line-by-line code writing to system-level design. She contends that core engineering disciplines like systems thinking, decomposition, and state management remain essential, moving craftsmanship up a layer rather than eliminating it.
writeup: Angie Jones argues that AI coding agents move the engineer's job from writing code line by line to designing systems. The talk holds that core disciplines, systems thinking, decomposition, and state management, stay essential even as agents handle more of the typing. The central claim: craftsmanship moves up a layer rather than disappearing, shifting the focus to system-level design and context management.
